question: Show the nations that have both members older than 22 and members younger than 19.
sql: SELECT Nationality FROM member GROUP BY Nationality HAVING MAX(Age) > 22 AND MIN(Age) < 19;

back_translation.intent: 查询具有特定年龄范围的国籍

semantic.reason: SQL反向翻译的描述缺少对年龄条件的过滤，未体现'older than 22'和'younger than 19'的筛选逻辑，也未包含确保每个国籍同时满足两个条件的逻辑。
